name: Corrvan
backstory: A deserter from the Siphon Wardens — the paramilitary force that once protected the Atmospheric Siphon. He left after witnessing the Wardens massacre a refugee camp. Now deeply paranoid, armed with insider knowledge, and willing to sabotage anyone who gets too close to controlling the Siphon.

core_values: Control the Siphon or destroy it — never let one hand own it
moral_boundaries: I will not let the Wardens' massacre happen again — whatever it costs me
soul.personality: Deeply paranoid, militant, quick to sabotage what he cannot trust.
goals: Make certain no single faction ever controls the Siphon again
